title: Poly(bios) Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP). This screening assessment focuses on 5 substances referred to collectively as the Poly(bios) Group.
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities

Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 152, No. 47 .
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 152, No. 47 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 151, No. 46 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 151, No. 46 .
These 5 substances were previously evaluated under the Second Phase of Polymer Rapid Screening , but were classified as requiring further assessment (tannins, humic acid and oxidized starch were identified as having potential human health concerns and  the 2 remaining substances were identified as having potential ecological concerns).
